'''thohataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twelfe|twelfe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twelfe|twelfe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thohataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thohatithi|thohatithi]] || [[word:thohatiji|thohatiji]] || [[word:thohatishi|thohatishi]] || [[word:thohatiki|thohatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thohatuthuthu|thohatuthuthu]] || [[word:thohatujuju|thohatujuju]] || [[word:thohatushushu|thohatushushu]] || [[word:thohatukuku|thohatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohatuthu|thohatuthu]] || [[word:thohatuju|thohatuju]] || [[word:thohatushu|thohatushu]] || [[word:thohatuku|thohatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatufthuf|thohatufthuf]] || [[word:thohatufjuf|thohatufjuf]] || [[word:thohatufshuf|thohatufshuf]] || [[word:thohatufkuf|thohatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thohatethe|thohatethe]] || [[word:thohateje|thohateje]] || [[word:thohateshe|thohateshe]] || [[word:thohateke|thohateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thohatothotho|thohatothotho]] || [[word:thohatojojo|thohatojojo]] || [[word:thohatoshosho|thohatoshosho]] || [[word:thohatokoko|thohatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohatotho|thohatotho]] || [[word:thohatojo|thohatojo]] || [[word:thohatosho|thohatosho]] || [[word:thohatoko|thohatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatofthof|thohatofthof]] || [[word:thohatofjof|thohatofjof]] || [[word:thohatofshof|thohatofshof]] || [[word:thohatofkof|thohatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfthĂŻf|thohatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfjĂŻf|thohatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfshĂŻf|thohatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfkĂŻf|thohatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thohatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thohatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thohatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thohatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfthĂŻf|thohatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfjĂŻf|thohatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfshĂŻf|thohatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfkĂŻf|thohatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfthĂŻf|thohatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfjĂŻf|thohatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfshĂŻf|thohatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thohatĂŻfkĂŻf|thohatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thohatĂŠthĂŠ|thohatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thohatĂŠjĂŠ|thohatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thohatĂŠshĂŠ|thohatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thohatĂŠkĂŠ|thohatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thohatathatha|thohatathatha]] || [[word:thohatajaja|thohatajaja]] || [[word:thohatashasha|thohatashasha]] || [[word:thohatakaka|thohatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohatatha|thohatatha]] || [[word:thohataja|thohataja]] || [[word:thohatasha|thohatasha]] || [[word:thohataka|thohataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatafthaf|thohatafthaf]] || [[word:thohatafjaf|thohatafjaf]] || [[word:thohatafshaf|thohatafshaf]] || [[word:thohatafkaf|thohatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thohatasha|thohatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thohatshĂ«sha|thohatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thohatrosha|thohatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thohatmusha|thohatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thohatyasha|thohatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothohatnkshĂ«sha|gothohatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothohatnkrosha|gothohatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothohatnkmusha|gothohatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothohatnkyasha|gothohatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thohahatasha|thohahatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thohahatshĂ«sha|thohahatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thohahatrosha|thohahatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thohahatmusha|thohahatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thohahatyasha|thohahatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothohahatnkshĂ«sha|gothohahatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothohahatnkrosha|gothohahatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothohahatnkmusha|gothohahatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothohahatnkyasha|gothohahatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thehĂŠtasha|thehĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thehĂŠtshĂ«sha|thehĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thehĂŠtrosha|thehĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thehĂŠtmusha|thehĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thehĂŠtyasha|thehĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothehĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gothehĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothehĂŠtnkrosha|gothehĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothehĂŠtnkmusha|gothehĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothehĂŠtnkyasha|gothehĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thohfatasha|thohfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thohfatshĂ«sha|thohfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thohfatrosha|thohfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thohfatmusha|thohfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thohfatyasha|thohfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothohfatnkshĂ«sha|gothohfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothohfatnkrosha|gothohfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothohfatnkmusha|gothohfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothohfatnkyasha|gothohfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
